title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing in the snow. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three children are making a snowman in a park. One child is putting a hat on the snowman and the others are holding snowballs. They are wearing warm coats, gloves and boots.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone reading on a train. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman is reading a book while travelling on a train. She is sitting next to a window with a small bag beside her. There are empty seats and countryside visible outside the window.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
